info.title: xtraq
info.description: Xtraq CLI Tool with auto-update capabilities

commands.name: build
commands.description: Generate client artefacts from local snapshots

options.name: --refresh-snapshot
options.description: Refresh snapshot before executing the build command

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show additional diagnostic information

options.name: --debug
options.description: Use debug environment settings

options.name: --debug-alias
options.description: Enable alias scope debug logging (promotes XTRAQ_LOG_LEVEL to debug)

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not read or write the local procedure metadata cache

options.name: --no-update
options.description: Skip update checks and prompts for this run

options.name: --procedure
options.description: Process only specific procedures (comma separated schema.name with optional '*' or '?' wildcards)

options.name: --telemetry
options.description: Persist a database telemetry report to .xtraq/telemetry

options.name: --ci
options.description: Disable Spectre.Console enhancements for CI/plain output modes

options.name: --project-path
options.description: Project root path (.env file or directory). Defaults to current directory when omitted.

arguments.name: project-path
arguments.description: Optional project root path (.env file or directory). Defaults to current directory when omitted.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing .env

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Root namespace (XTRAQ_NAMESPACE)

options.name: --connection
options.description: Snapshot connection string (XTRAQ_GENERATOR_DB)

options.name: --schemas
options.description: Comma separated allow-list (XTRAQ_BUILD_SCHEMAS)
